name: Apify
description: Web scraping and automation platform. Search actors, run them with JSON input, monitor runs, and retrieve dataset results.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Verify the Apify token and return the authenticated user's private account metadata.

tools.name: search_store_actors
tools.description: Search public Apify Store actors. Use this to discover real-estate, lead, social, search, scraping, or automation actors before running one. Prefer responseFormat='agent' for compact agent-readable results.

search.description: Search text matched against actor title, name, description, username, and README, e.g. 'real estate listings'.

limit.description: Maximum actors to return. Default and maximum are 1000.

offset.description: Number of actors to skip for pagination.

username.description: Only return actors from this Apify username.

pricingModel.description: Only return actors with this pricing model.

allowsAgenticUsers.description: When true, only return actors marked as allowing agentic users.

responseFormat.description: Use 'agent' for a reduced field set optimized for LLM consumers; default is 'full'.

includeUnrunnableActors.description: By default unrunnable actors are excluded. Set true only when you intentionally need the full store search.

tools.name: list_actors
tools.description: List actors the authenticated user created or used. Use my=true to list only actors owned by the user.

my.description: If true, only return actors owned by the authenticated user.

limit.description: Maximum actors to return. Default and maximum are 1000.

tools.name: get_actor
tools.description: Get details for a specific actor. actorId must be an Apify actor ID or a tilde-separated name like 'apify~web-scraper' or 'compass~crawler-google-places'. Do not use slash form in this API path.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

tools.name: get_actor_openapi
tools.description: Get an actor build's OpenAPI definition, including the actor input schema when the actor exposes one. Use buildId='default' for the actor's default build. actorId must be an Apify actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

buildId.description: Actor build ID, or 'default' to fetch the default build OpenAPI schema.

tools.name: run_actor
tools.description: Run an Apify actor asynchronously with a JSON input object. The response contains the run ID, status, defaultDatasetId, and defaultKeyValueStoreId. Poll get_run or fetch results from get_dataset_items after the run succeeds. actorId must be an Apify actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

input.description: JSON input passed directly to the actor. Use get_actor_openapi or the actor's Apify Input tab to discover expected fields. Pass {} for actors with no input.

timeout.description: Optional actor run timeout in seconds.

memory.description: Optional memory limit in MB, usually a power of 2 such as 256, 512, 1024, 2048, or 4096.

maxItems.description: Maximum charged dataset items for pay-per-result actors. This is a billing cap, not a guaranteed result limit.

maxTotalChargeUsd.description: Maximum total charge in USD for pay-per-event actors.

restartOnError.description: Restart the actor run automatically if it fails.

build.description: Actor build tag or build number, e.g. 'latest' or '0.1.234'.

waitForFinish.description: Wait up to this many seconds for the async run to finish before returning. Maximum is 60.

webhooks.description: Base64-encoded JSON array of Apify webhook definitions for this run.

tools.name: run_actor_sync_get_dataset_items
tools.description: Run an Apify actor and wait for dataset items in the response. This is the most convenient one-call path for agents when the actor finishes within roughly 5 minutes. For longer jobs, use run_actor then get_run and get_dataset_items.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

input.description: JSON input passed directly to the actor. Use get_actor_openapi or the actor's Apify Input tab to discover expected fields. Pass {} for actors with no input.

timeout.description: Optional actor run timeout in seconds.

maxItems.description: Maximum charged dataset items for pay-per-result actors.

maxTotalChargeUsd.description: Maximum total charge in USD for pay-per-event actors.

restartOnError.description: Restart the actor run automatically if it fails.

build.description: Actor build tag or build number.

webhooks.description: Base64-encoded JSON array of Apify webhook definitions for this run.

clean.description: Return only non-empty items and omit hidden fields.

offset.description: Number of result items to skip.

outputFields.description: Comma-separated output names that rename fields positionally.

tools.name: run_actor_sync
tools.description: Run an Apify actor synchronously and return the actor's OUTPUT record from its default key-value store. Use this when the actor writes its final result to OUTPUT instead of a dataset.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

input.description: JSON input passed directly to the actor. Pass {} for actors with no input.

timeout.description: Optional actor run timeout in seconds.

maxItems.description: Maximum charged dataset items for pay-per-result actors.

maxTotalChargeUsd.description: Maximum total charge in USD for pay-per-event actors.

restartOnError.description: Restart the actor run automatically if it fails.

build.description: Actor build tag or build number.

webhooks.description: Base64-encoded JSON array of Apify webhook definitions for this run.

tools.name: get_run
tools.description: Get one actor run by runId. Use waitForFinish up to 60 seconds to poll until a terminal status is reached. The response includes defaultDatasetId for get_dataset_items.

runId.description: Actor run ID returned by run_actor.

waitForFinish.description: Maximum seconds to wait for completion. Maximum is 60.

tools.name: abort_run
tools.description: Abort a starting or running Apify actor run. Set gracefully=true to give the actor a short window to persist state before aborting.

gracefully.description: Abort gracefully instead of killing immediately.

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List runs for a specific actor. actorId must be an Apify actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name.

actorId.description: Actor ID or tilde-separated owner/name, e.g. 'apify~web-scraper'.

limit.description: Maximum runs to return. Default and maximum are 1000.

status.description: Single status or comma-separated statuses, e.g. 'SUCCEEDED' or 'RUNNING,READY'.

startedAfter.description: Only runs started after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

startedBefore.description: Only runs started before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

tools.name: list_user_runs
tools.description: List all actor runs for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by status or start time.

limit.description: Maximum runs to return. Default and maximum are 1000.

status.description: Single status or comma-separated statuses, e.g. 'SUCCEEDED' or 'RUNNING,READY'.

startedAfter.description: Only runs started after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

startedBefore.description: Only runs started before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.description: List datasets owned by the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_dataset
tools.description: Get metadata for a dataset. This does not return items; use get_dataset_items for records.

datasetId.description: Dataset ID or tilde-separated username/dataset name.

tools.name: list_key_value_stores
tools.description: List key-value stores owned by the authenticated user. Useful for finding actor OUTPUT records and files stored outside datasets.

limit.description: Maximum stores to return. Default and maximum are 1000.

tools.name: get_key_value_store
tools.description: Get metadata for an Apify key-value store.

tools.name: get_key_value_store_record
tools.description: Get a record value from an Apify key-value store. Use defaultKeyValueStoreId from a run and key='OUTPUT' for actors that store final output outside datasets.

disableRedirect.description: When true, return metadata instead of redirecting to large binary values where supported.

tools.name: get_dataset_items
tools.description: Retrieve items from an Apify dataset. Use defaultDatasetId from run_actor/get_run, or use run_actor_sync_get_dataset_items for one-call execution and results.

datasetId.description: Dataset ID or tilde-separated username/dataset name.

clean.description: Return only non-empty items and omit hidden fields.

outputFields.description: Comma-separated output names that rename fields positionally.

attachment.description: Force file download style response for browser clients.

bom.description: Include a byte-order mark for CSV output.
